mapper.sql: menu_idx, parent_menu_idx, menu_url, menu_name, menu_type, print_seq, use_yn, view_yn, add_date, modify_date, group_idx, manage_idx, content_title_yn, link_url
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 0 AS menu_idx, -1 AS parent_menu_idx, '' AS menu_url, '최상위' as menu_name, 0 AS print_seq, 0 AS manage_idx, '' AS board_category1, 'ROOT' AS menu_type, 1 AS load_on_demand FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT menu_idx, parent_menu_idx, menu_url, menu_name, print_seq, manage_idx, board_category1, menu_type, CASE WHEN menu_type = 'FOLDER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS load_on_demand FROM CMS_COMMON_MENU ) CONNECT BY PRIOR menu_idx = parent_menu_idx START WITH parent_menu_idx = -1 ORDER SIBLINGS BY print_seq

SELECT level as menu_level, A.* FROM ( SELECT menu_idx, parent_menu_idx, menu_url, menu_name, print_seq, menu_type, group_idx, manage_idx, link_url, view_yn, menu_top_icon, board_category1, CASE WHEN menu_type = 'FOLDER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS load_on_demand FROM CMS_COMMON_MENU WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND view_yn != 'N' ) A CONNECT BY PRIOR menu_idx = parent_menu_idx START WITH parent_menu_idx = 0 ORDER SIBLINGS BY print_seq

SELECT menu_idx, parent_menu_idx, menu_url, menu_name, print_seq, menu_type, manage_idx, link_url, view_yn, menu_left_icon, (level) AS menu_level, board_category1 FROM CMS_COMMON_MENU WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND view_yn != 'N' AND group_idx = #{group_idx} CONNECT BY PRIOR menu_idx = parent_menu_idx START WITH parent_menu_idx = 0 ORDER SIBLINGS BY print_seq ASC
SELECT menu_url as id, menu_name as label FROM CMS_COMMON_MENU WHERE parent_menu_idx = #{id}

SELECT menu_idx, parent_menu_idx, menu_url, menu_name, group_idx, menu_type, use_yn, view_yn, print_seq, add_date, modify_date, group_idx, menu_full_path_name, manage_idx, content_title_yn, menu_img, link_url, menu_top_icon, menu_left_icon, board_category1 FROM CMS_COMMON_MENU WHERE menu_idx = #{menu_idx}

SELECT menu_idx, parent_menu_idx, menu_url , menu_name, menu_type, use_yn, view_yn, print_seq, add_date, modify_date, group_idx, menu_full_path_name, manage_idx, content_title_yn, menu_img, link_url, menu_top_icon, menu_left_icon, board_category1 FROM CMS_COMMON_MENU WHERE menu_idx = (SELECT parent_menu_idx FROM CMS_COMMON_MENU WHERE menu_idx = #{menu_idx})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_COMMON_MENU WHERE menu_idx != #{menu_idx} AND menu_url = #{menu_url}
mapper.update:
UPDATE CMS_COMMON_MENU SET menu_url = #{menu_url}, menu_name = #{menu_name}, menu_type = #{menu_type}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, view_yn = #{view_yn}, print_seq = #{print_seq}, modify_date = SYSDATE, manage_idx = #{manage_idx}, content_title_yn = #{content_title_yn}, link_url = #{link_url},
menu_img = #{menu_img},
menu_top_icon = #{menu_top_icon},
menu_left_icon = #{menu_left_icon},
menu_full_path_name =
#{menu_name}
( SELECT LTRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(menu_name,' > '),' >') || ' > ' || #{menu_name} AS menu_full_path_name FROM CMS_COMMON_MENU WHERE menu_idx = #{parent_menu_idx} CONNECT BY PRIOR menu_idx = parent_menu_idx START WITH parent_menu_idx = 0 )
WHERE menu_idx = #{menu_idx}

UPDATE CMS_COMMON_MENU SET parent_menu_idx = #{move_target_menu_idx}, group_idx = NVL((SELECT group_idx FROM CMS_COMMON_MENU where menu_idx = #{move_target_menu_idx}), 0), modify_date = SYSDATE WHERE menu_idx = #{menu_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT menu_url, menu_name FROM CMS_COMMON_MENU CONNECT BY PRIOR menu_idx = parent_menu_idx START WITH parent_menu_idx = #{menu_idx} ORDER SIBLINGS BY print_seq
SELECT NVL(MAX(print_seq), 0) + 10 FROM CMS_COMMON_MENU WHERE parent_menu_idx = #{menu_idx}
